visual_description: The audio is dominated by a high-energy, dramatic electronic music track. It begins with a powerful, driving beat and a tense, synthesized melody, immediately establishing a mood of suspense and action. The video opens with a low-angle, out-of-focus shot looking up a dimly lit, narrow corridor. In the blurry foreground, a person in a light-colored hooded jacket is crouched down. In the background, a bald man with a mustache, wearing a dark suit, walks purposefully toward the camera. The corridor is lined with what appear to be market stalls, with some items covered in plastic. The camera slowly sharpens its focus, bringing the man into clear view. He has a serious, determined expression as he approaches. The Chinese characters "风行网" are visible in the top right corner of the screen. The music is loud and forceful, creating a sense of urgency and impending confrontation. The scene cuts to a close-up, shaky shot of a woman with dark hair tied back. She is in a dimly lit, warm-toned room. She appears distressed, with her face partially obscured as she moves quickly. The camera is unsteady, following her frantic movements. The "风行网" text remains in the top right corner.
